name: export_html
description:
Export nodes to HTML.

- Takes an array of node IDs and exports them as HTML.
- Supports HTML + Tailwind and HTML + CSS output.
- Can include a full HTML scaffold, layer names, and layer IDs.
- Image assets are always referenced with relative paths (never embedded).
- Writes the HTML file to outputPath and returns its absolute path.

filePath.description: An optional file path to access a .pen file.

includeHtmlScaffold.description: Include a full HTML document scaffold (default: true)

includeLayerIds.description: Include layer IDs as data attributes (default: false)

includeLayerNames.description: Include layer names as data attributes (default: true)

nodeIds.description: Array of node IDs to export

outputPath.description: Path to write the exported HTML file
